findings.message: The plan adds preset UX and chain integration in the same phase, increasing the chance that T11 scope leaks into T12.
findings.recommendation: Keep the red-team skill/report contract separate from feature flag and chain wiring tasks.

findings.message: The design review does not explicitly state how secrets in research notes should be treated before prompts are sent to a provider.
findings.recommendation: Add a gate note requiring secret redaction or human confirmation before provider-backed review.

findings.message: The plan assumes conditional chain generation can include red-team-plan before that mechanism is tested.
findings.recommendation: Require T12 to prove static enabled/disabled chain selection before editing source chains.

findings.message: Rollback mentions disabling adversarialDesign but does not say how active runs with red-team-plan artifacts are drained.
findings.recommendation: Keep the active-run drain or no-op compatibility stub policy visible in the gate report.

findings.message: A missing optional research.md artifact could be misread as a failure instead of a review constraint.
findings.recommendation: Emit an ok report with a finding that names the missing optional research context when plan.md is still reviewable.

findings.message: The design assumes reviewers will distinguish a red-team finding from plan-quality fail semantics.
findings.recommendation: Make RedTeamPlanReport status and finding severity separate from PlanQualityReport verdict in the gate summary.

findings.message: Provider availability is not guaranteed during planning review.
findings.recommendation: Treat provider outage as soft_fail and continue to plan-gate with a visible warning finding.
